title: Spicy Marrakech Steak Medley
description: A comforting Moroccan dish featuring a medley of chewy fillets of steak served with a spicy marinade that is both diabetic-friendly and easy to prepare.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine olive oil, onion, garlic, cumin, paprika, cinnamon, lemon juice, vinegar, honey, salt, and pepper. Mix well until all ingredients are fully incorporated.
Add the steaks to the marinade, making sure they are coated evenly with the mixture. Cover and refrigerate for at least 4 hours or overnight for maximum flavor development.
Preheat your grill or a pan on medium-high heat. Remove the steaks from the marinade, letting any excess drip off, then place them on the preheated grill or in the pan.
Cook each steak to desired doneness (approximately 15-20 minutes total cooking time), flipping occasionally and brushing with remaining marinade if needed. Keep warm until all steaks are cooked.
Serve hot over a bed of couscous or quinoa for added flavor and texture.
